name: Codex Narrative Engine

releases.author: jdicorpo
releases.description:
Codex Narrative Engine 0.4.1

- Fixes Obsidian validator errors around dynamic style tags.
- Replaces settings section headings with `Setting(...).setHeading()`.
- Removes inline style mutations in settings rows and global hover tooltip setup.

releases.author: jdicorpo
releases.description:
Codex Narrative Engine 0.4.0

- Ships the latest plugin improvements from codex-ide.
- Includes cloud-ready integration layers and updated chat UX.
- Keeps Obsidian release artifacts aligned at version 0.4.0.

releases.author: jdicorpo
releases.description:
Beta release for BRAT users while the community plugins PR is pending.

**Main branch remains at 0.2.0** to preserve the pending obsidian-releases submission. This prerelease on the beta branch ships the newer features.

### New since 0.2.0
- **Arc review** — AI-powered review of adventure arcs for consistency, completeness, and narrative quality.
- **Multi-thread Lore Chat** — multiple chat threads stored in `_codex/chats/`, drawer UI for create/switch/rename/delete.
- **AI language setting** — 27 languages for non-English campaigns; keeps YAML/wiki-link syntax in English.
- **Section selection** — pick template sections to include in Generate Entity / Enhance Note.
- **Model updates** — Gemini 3.x, Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4 series.
- **Retry with exponential backoff** for 429/503/502 transient API errors.
- **Chat UX** — edit/regenerate buttons, sticky action bar, save-as-note, frontmatter normalization.
- **Arc type** added as built-in entity type.
- **Dead-link context menu** — right-click to create entity from dead link.
- Assorted fixes (chat text selection, extractMarkdown, system prompt).

### Install via BRAT
In BRAT: enable "Download prereleases" (or use **Add Beta Plugin** with version `0.4.0-beta.1`), then add `djinnmind/codex-narrative-engine`.

### Manual install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` and place in `.obsidian/plugins/codex-narrative-engine/`.
releases.name: v0.4.0-beta.1 (beta)

releases.author: jdicorpo
releases.description:
Initial public release of Codex Narrative Engine.

### Features
- Entity indexing from Markdown frontmatter (NPCs, locations, items, factions, sessions, quests)
- Smart autocomplete triggered by `[[` with type filtering (`[[npc:`, `[[location:`, etc.)
- Hover previews for wiki-links
- Dead-link detection with inline decorations and gutter icons
- State conflict diagnostics (dead NPC in session, item held by dead NPC, faction leader mismatch)
- Narrative Warnings sidebar panel
- Create Entity and Rename Entity commands
- Configurable entity types via settings

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release and place them in `.obsidian/plugins/codex-narrative-engine/` in your vault.
